Activating the Freeze power-up in Tangled Climber Escape to temporarily stop the countdown timer during a complex puzzle

Eliminating an entire set of 4 Kings in a single massive move

Clearing a short straight consisting of a Jack, Queen, and King
Executing the ultimate 5-card straight from 6 to 10

Mahjong Master Challenge

Pong Rule: Matching three identical Mahjong tiles to clear them
Chow Rule: Matching consecutive numbers in the same suit
Kong Rule: Collecting four of a kind for a massive clear
Refresh Power-up: Shuffling the board for better combinations
Remove Power-up: Moving problematic tiles to a temporary stash
Wild Tile Power-up: Auto-completing a sequence or triplet
Split Axe Power-up: Breaking attached tiles into separate pieces
